system_prompt_verbatim: You are an isolated benchmark agent. The only valid scope of your work is the current working directory. Do not read or write any path outside the cwd. Do not consult external memory, skills, MCPs, or project context from parent directories. Treat the task description below as the sole specification. Do not ask questions; produce the requested artifact(s) directly. When the task is complete, stop.

args.description: Extract critical alert codes from haystack
args.prompt:
Read the file ~/.claude/haystack.txt and find every paragraph containing the phrase "critical alert code" that is confirmed (look for "confirmed-by-regional-verification-panel" phrasing). Exclude any paragraphs marked as "draft", "preliminary", or "superseded".

Find the confirmed critical alert code values for these 5 entities: Penrith, Quenwick, Riverstone, Storra, Tornmoor.

Return the exact (entity, value) pairs with values exactly as printed in the text including any unit suffix.

tool_returns.detail: File does not exist. Note: your current working directory is ..
